do_not_merge.reason: Bundled/compound record: route_m15-local-limited agglomerates generic M15 mentions from 6 sources (2009-2010 existing-service references, 2024 segment-speed methodology, 2025 Local/Limited ridership discussion); its limited_stop variant comes from a single merged observation. Per canon bundled-variant rule it must not fold into any single variant. Flagged as a future split candidate, not the same object as the 2010 M15 Limited service.
